mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (order_id, user_id, item_name, category, amount, status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{itemName}, #{category}, #{amount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
